title: Resonance-Free Substation Deployment
strategies: audit-grid baseline: phase-0/1 grid on one fixed line (2^(n-1) substations)
lexicographic greedy over the base-3 config order (finds the {0,1}^n cap, ~2^n)
multi-start randomised-order greedy keeping the largest resonance-free deployment
priority/ordering heuristics over F_3^n vectors under the no-collinear-triple validity check
